message:
feat(database): replace ambient Instant::now() with injectable time source in DbPool

Both DbPool and AsyncDbPool used Instant::now() directly for connection
lifecycle timestamps (created_at, last_used, expiry checks, timeout
deadlines), making pool behavior impossible to test deterministically.

Changes:
- Add wall_clock_now() helper and time_getter field to both pool types
- Add with_time_getter() constructors and time_getter() accessors
- IdleConnection: rename is_expired/is_idle_too_long to *_at() variants
  that accept explicit Instant parameter
- All checkout, return, eviction, and warm-up paths use (self.time_getter)()
- checkout_with_retry deadline logic uses injectable clock
- Add deterministic test infrastructure: OnceLock-based test clock with
  AtomicU64 offset, lock_test_clock() for test isolation
- Add AsyncTestManager stub for async pool testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
